message:
ship: publish wills-and-estate-planning article (draft: true → false)

Flips the single source-of-truth draft flag in writingHighlights. The
article route derives DRAFT from this entry, so this one-line change
cascades:
- Article surfaces in /writing index, RSS feed, sitemap, command palette
- robots: noindex/nofollow metadata removed (Google/Bing can index)
- Home-page feature strip stops filtering it out

Ships 3h+ of restructure + polish + review work. Review swarm round 1
(interrupted by codex rate-limits) produced 12 substantive fix commits
including security (rel=noopener), a11y (prefers-reduced-motion gating),
and consistency fixes across article + primer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     date: "2026-04-19",
     featured: true,
-    draft: true,
+    draft: false,
